title: 愛した日々に悔いはない

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and I are on our way home after a day
out, when...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh...
I follow her gaze.

There's a poster advertising an exhibition on
plays. It looks like it'll be ending today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Would that be all right? Won't it be late by the
time we finish and go home?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you! I'll take you up on that offer,
then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is regarded as the first musical to have ever
been performed!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It didn't have much by way of a story, but it was
highly regarded for how beautiful it was.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Look at that! That costume is really famous, and...

It's rare to see Fuji Kiseki so excited. She's usually
so busy taking care of everyone else, so it feels
like I'm seeing a new side of her.
choice_data_list:
(It's nice to see her so happy. I hope she enjoys
the rest of the exhibition.)

text_block_list.text:
I continue walking through the displays with her
as she gestures at each one with bright eyes and
flushed cheeks.

We admire everything in the exhibition until it's
almost closing time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm...

Fuji Kiseki looks concerned about something
after she comes back from the restroom.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well... I know they're about to close, but I'd like
look at just one more thing before we go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But the final two displays are both so interesting,
I don't know which one to look at!

She must be talking about the displays for "The
Trajectory of Musicals and Stage Plays" and "The
Advance of Underground Theater."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, my mother is featured in the display
for "The Trajectory of Musicals and Stage Plays."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But the director featured in "The Advance of
Underground Theater" is actually a friend I made
back when I was a child actor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My vested interest in both exhibits is making it
impossible for me to choose!

As much as I feel for her, we don't have much time
left. I decide to offer a suggestion.
choice_data_list:
Let's check out "The Trajectory of Musicals and
Stage Plays."

Let's check out "The Advance of Underground
Theater."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It makes sense to see the one my
mother's featured in. Good idea!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Some people say my mother lit the spark of
interest for musical theater in Japan, you know.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Musicals were said to have a narrow audience
appeal back then, but she enjoyed a very long
run as the lead in the first musical to wildly
exceed everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But my mother's not just good at acting! Look at this.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The world of theater was incredibly competitive,
but she implemented fresh new ideas into shows
to draw new viewers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I used to look in on her rehearsals back then, and
the cast and crew were always so nice to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And this is...

Fuji Kiseki, right in the middle of excitedly
explaining something, suddenly closes her mouth.
I follow her line of sight.

text_block_list.name: Young Fuji
text_block_list.text: Today and tomorrow as well—we fight for bread!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is the first play I performed in outside
my youth troupe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It was just a small role, but my mother was the
lead. It was the first time we stood together on
the same stage!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was so nervous while waiting in the green room,
but everyone told me jokes and gave me snacks
to help me relax.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The line the wife says here is so funny! This
really takes me back!
choice_data_list: You must really treasure those days.
You must really treasure those days.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I do. Those days were like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My feelings haven't changed, though.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My goal hasn't changed since back then. Even
now, I'm still aiming to become the world's best
entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The only thing that has changed is that I have an indispensable partner with me—and that's you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In another couple dozen years, I might be looking
back on my racing days with the same sense of
nostalgia.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice if you were still by my side when that
time comes, so we can reminisce about the good
old days together, just like now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! I forgot they're going to close soon.
Let's keep moving.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Also... it's embarrassing when you stare at me so
intently!
Fuji Kiseki and I have a wonderful time together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right! They've put the spotlight on my
friend, and I can't go home without looking at her
display!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the advice. C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they perform in shopping districts and even
reserve entire trains for shows?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so they did it to make underground theater
feel more intimate. That's so cool. It must be a lot
of work.

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"I have a close friend that I've known since we
were both child actors, and it's thanks to her that
I'm where I am today."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that interview footage?

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"A long time ago, I believed my worth was tied to
my success. And the more I wrote, the harder it
became to create anything."

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"Everything felt so bleak, but my friend told me
something important. She said, 'There's more to
life than yearning for success. You have to take
your own path.'"

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"Hearing that gave me the confidence to go
through with what I really wanted to do with my
life."

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"She's long since retired from the stage and
turned to the world of racing..."

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Woman
text_block_list.text:
"But her words are still pillars of support in my
heart. Not that she knows. I've never had the
chance to tell her!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wow...
choice_data_list: Are you the friend she's talking about?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess so!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... This is kind of embarrassing. I wasn't
expecting to get such a special mention!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She's ten years older than me, but we were really
close when we were in our youth troupe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was just a kid, she spoke to me like
an equal, and we talked about our dreams
together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it is getting me nostalgic... I'm
glad she's doing so well.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It is! But it's not just a memory.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Having dreams and chasing after them requires so
much perseverance...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We were able to cultivate so much as child actors.
Maybe right now, we're standing on that very
foundation we built then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That goes for her and me.

We stand side-by-side and continue watching the
interview for a while longer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Would you like to come see one of
her plays with me sometime?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She's part of my path, and I'd like you to know
her too.

Soon after leaving, we make plans to attend a
show. I feel like I was able to see a new side to
Fuji Kiseki that day.
